CONTENT.Career: Aceves is a youth product of CD Parquesol before moving to Real Valladolid as a benjamín for the Íscar Cup. He was promoted to the reserves in 2021, eventually becoming their starter.On 15 July 2022, Aceves signed a professional contract with the club until 2025. He was promoted to the senior Valladolid side as third goalkeeper for the 2022–23 season. He made his professional debut with Valladolid as a late substitute in a 2–1 La Liga loss to Real Betis in February 2023, making 3 saves and keeping a clean sheet in his cameo.On 1 September 2023, Aceves was loaned to Segunda División side CD Eldense for the 2023–24 season.
CONTENT.External links: Álvaro Aceves at BDFutbolÁlvaro Aceves at LaPreferente.com (in Spanish)Álvaro Aceves at Soccerway
CONTENT.International career: Aceves was called up to the Spain U17s in 2020, but did not make an appearance as the call-up was cut short due to the COVID-19 pandemic. He was called up to the Spain U19s in January 2022.

SUMMARY: Álvaro Aceves Catalina (born 26 July 2003) is a Spanish professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Real Valladolid.
